trade.summary: Giappone-Svezia trade is modest but strategically significant due to Swedish technology exports including Ericsson telecom equipment, SKF bearings, Sandvik materials, and Volvo/Scania vehicles. Giappone exports automobiles, electronics, and machinery to Svezia. Both countries benefit from the EU-Giappone EPA.
top_products_b_to_a: industrial bearings and precision tools (SKF, Sandvik)

diplomatic.summary: Giappone-Svezia relations are warm and built on shared liberal democratic values, multilateralism, and technology leadership. Svezia joined NATO in 2024 while Giappone has strengthened its Stati Uniti alliance, creating greater security alignment. Both countries cooperate on climate, gender equality, and innovation policy. Svezia's 2024 NATO accession was welcomed by Giappone.

military.summary: Svezia's 2024 NATO accession has expanded potential security cooperation with Giappone as a Stati Uniti ally. Growing dialogue on technology security and defense industrial cooperation. Svezia's advanced defense industry (Saab) has potential relevance for Giappone's expanding defense procurement. No formal bilateral defense treaty.
military.alliance_status: Aligned — Sweden now NATO, Japan US treaty ally

financial.summary: Moderate bilateral investment flows. Swedish multinationals (Ericsson, SKF, IKEA, Volvo) have significant Giappone operations. Giapponeese companies invest in Svezia in manufacturing and technology. Svezia's pension funds hold Giapponeese equity positions.

energy.summary: Limited direct bilateral energy trade. Svezia is largely energy self-sufficient through nuclear and hydroelectric power. Cooperation on energy innovation including hydrogen technology and battery storage is growing.

scientific.summary: Strong scientific cooperation, particularly in materials science, life sciences, and environmental technology. Both countries are significant research powers. Swedish and Giapponeese universities have active exchange programs. Collaboration on battery technology (relevant to Northvolt-Giappone battery value chains) is expanding.
